title: Basic Calculator
desc: A lightweight standalone calculator utility integrated directly into the workspace layout.
cons: Does not support advanced scientific math notations
warning: Ensure clean numeric characters are provided to prevent script crash flags.

title: WhatsApp Database Parser
desc: Parses Android or iOS WhatsApp databases and displays records back inside a clean bubble conversation format.
features: Handles standard msgstore.db and ChatStorage.sqlite schemas
Beautiful localized WhatsApp dark palette rendering window
cons: Cannot bypass database encryptions without an external explicit 64-character hex key file link
warning: Tampering with a live device database directly without write protection rules voids evidence integrity chain standards.

title: Windows Timeline Database Explorer
desc: Parses and traces system ActivitiesCache.db layers to show structural historic user interactions.
features: Auto-locates current Windows user profile database directory structures
Uses read-only file URI layers to bypass concurrent OS execution locks
cons: Windows 11 modern builds have heavily deprecated database logging records out of this table layout
warning: Historical log tables maintain a rolling 30-day lifecycle limit buffer before system background workers purge old entries.

title: Browser History & Session Carver
desc: Collects history streams across Chrome, Edge, and Brave. Attempts to carve deleted logs directly out of persistent SNSS binary logs.
features: Bypasses runtime locks with structural shadow caching
Extracts deleted browsing sessions directly via regex carvers
cons: Cannot parse records if the disk blocks have been explicitly defragmented or completely overwritten
warning: Ensure strict authorization is confirmed before analyzing local profile folders to comply with evidentiary constraints.

title: Volatile Memory Data Carver
desc: Automates lookups inside Windows crash minidumps and carves raw ASCII/UTF-16 text arrays out of volatile RAM images to pull back fileless traces.
features: Dual-encoding string array carvers targeting darkweb onion configurations
cons: Caps scanning sequences to primary file blocks to preserve responsive UI execution runtimes
warning: Volatile memory structures alter content states completely upon hardware shutdown sequences.

title: Application Compatibility Cache Parser
desc: Extracts process footprint records across ShimCache registry streams and Amcache hive tracks to verify the historical presence of executed files.
features: Dual extraction modules checking volatile and non-volatile registers
SHA-1 cryptographic signature profiling for binary verification
cons: Relies on internal text/binary patterns mining loops for standalone portable deployments
warning: ShimCache entries track process execution configurations primarily upon operational system shutdown states.
